title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Brook, Pedro, Luffy as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been about five years since that man appeared on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: The former pirate captain and "poneglyph thief" of the MINK Tribe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would appear that, as we speak... He has infiltrated this island once more, souffle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back then, his life was spared thanks in no small part to Pekoms' appeal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would you dare challenge us once more...

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At any rate, those red stones ...the "road Doneglyphs",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are, so to speak, the path to becoming pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are precious articles of such high importance that fellow yonko would go so far as to steal them from one another-bon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For Mama's sake, we put our very lives at risk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To keep this "Trump card" in our grasp at all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Inside whole cake chateau, next to the ''room of Offerings': The alcohol storehouse

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's more guards?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sweet Commander?! That's one of their top brass...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They called her a "sweet Commander"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that Tamago has become aware of my presence,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The situation has turned hopeless! They strengthened their security detail and made it impene- trade at the worst possible time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would appear that our silver of hope has completely vanished!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we were to approach in the dark of night, we wouldn't have so much as a single second to find an opening...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even Luffy and company are having a rough go of things... what can the two of us possibly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHOOSH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's gotten to the point where I'd like nothing more than to smoothly wrap up the mission and pull out of here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I was truly moved by your tale the other day, Pedro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order to make luffy the pirate king,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The road poneglyphs will be absolutely necessary! ...However, returning to this island a second time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would be a near- impossible undertaking! That much is certain...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: better yet, if we seriously were to attempt to return,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would have no choice but to fight our way in from the front.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how you look at it, there's simply no way we'd be able to reach this point with the entire crew...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this very moment is a rare and unique chance, and it may be our only one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if the two of us were to raid the building, it would certainly spell our demise!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Who is Baron Tamago's target?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was wondering if I was a little more interested in the last few days, I would have been able to get my own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's me.

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: pedro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could I ask you to be the bait?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...what a coinci- dance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I was thinking the exact same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one chance to become pirate King! An Infiltration Plan that means certain death?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
